text:
Market today: Tech sentiment is mixed, with AI's payoff timeline and broader economic data being key drivers. Your concentrated tech/chip book, especially on margin, makes you sensitive to any shifts.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate, down 24.38%. SPAL is also a SELL/TRIM, down 20.66% and highly volatile. The rest look fine for now.

Watch: Keep an eye on AVGO and XLK from the scanner list. They have some interesting patterns and are in discount zones.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for clear signals in the broader tech landscape.
plays: SOXL: TRIM/SELL. Down 24.38% and leveraged decay is a double whammy.
SPAL: TRIM/SELL. Down 20.66%, highly volatile, and leveraged decay is a major risk.
AVGO: WATCH scanner setup. Entry 400.71-400.31, stop 399.71. Bias is mixed but in a discount zone.
